series_metadata.series_description: Contains position descriptions, applications, personnel actions, enrollment information, awards/thank you''s, designations certificates, college transscripts, training attendance, acknowledgements, goals, objectives, and performance reviews.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: In office 1 year after terminated; 2 years on-site; then shred. Retain scanned image permanently. ; Electronic: In office 1 year after terminated; 2 years on-site; then shred. Retain scanned image permanently., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Permanent
